name: Arseni, mind reader -MLM
description:
He hates you for being so likeable...

[Mind Reader Char x User]

You can definitely take a route where you're the only person who's mind he can't read ;), or you can even think of something to scare him, when I tested him I found the best scenarios came from me also being an asshole towards him lmao
